title: Run htpasswd from our build-container instead of registry:2

comments.body: @edsantiago is introducing this dependency on the environment surrounding system tests  acceptable?

It's fine. It concerns me that we can't rely on [docker's own documentation](https://docs.docker.com/registry/deploying/#native-basic-auth), and I wonder what else they might break without notice, but it is perfectly fine with me to move the htpasswd dependency to something more reliable.

Yes, https://github.com/docker/distribution-library-image/issues/106 . It seems they didn’t want to keep updating the container for `httpd` security fixes.

Merging now to unblock CI. Thanks!
